title: UK economy contracts as Iran war impact felt
summary: The UK economy shrank in April as the Iran war began affecting businesses, according to official data. This economic contraction reflects how global conflicts can quickly impact domestic markets. The slowdown signals potential challenges for the British economy in coming months.
content: The economy shrank slightly in April as the Iran war began to have an impact on businesses, official data shows.

zh.title: 英国经济收缩 伊朗战争影响显现
zh.summary: 根据官方数据,由于伊朗战争开始影响企业,英国经济在4月份萎缩。这次经济收缩反映了全球冲突如何能迅速冲击国内市场。这种放缓预示英国经济在未来几个月可能面临挑战。

title: 'I was employee number one': SpaceX co-founder reacts to firm's market debut
summary: Tom Mueller, SpaceX's first employee and co-founder alongside Elon Musk in 2002, reflected on the company's transition to going public. This marks a significant milestone for the space technology company. Mueller's perspective as an early team member provides insight into SpaceX's evolution from startup to major corporation.
content: The BBC's Michelle Fleury spoke to Tom Mueller, who was one of the company's founders alongside Elon Musk in 2002.

zh.title: "我是第一号员工":SpaceX联合创始人对公司上市首秀做出回应
zh.summary: 2002年与埃隆·马斯克共同创办SpaceX的第一员工汤姆·穆勒反思了该公司向上市过渡的过程。这对太空技术公司来说是一个重大里程碑。穆勒作为早期团队成员的观点提供了对SpaceX从初创公司到大型公司演变的深入了解。

title: ChatGPT hits a billion monthly app users despite souring public AI sentiment
summary: ChatGPT achieved a billion monthly active users in May, demonstrating rapid AI adoption despite growing concerns about ethical and environmental impacts. The milestone underscores both massive demand for AI applications and public ambivalence about their consequences. This growth occurs amid broader scrutiny of AI's societal effects.
content: ChatGPT reached a billion monthly users in May despite growing unease over its ethical and environmental impacts.

zh.title: ChatGPT达到十亿月活用户 尽管公众对AI的情绪恶化
zh.summary: ChatGPT在5月实现了10亿月活跃用户,证明了尽管对伦理和环保影响的担忧日益增长,AI仍在快速普及。这个里程碑既强调了对AI应用的巨大需求,也反映了公众对其后果的矛盾态度。这种增长发生在对AI社会效应更广泛审查的背景下。

title: BTS-mania poised to boost South Korea's economy well into the future
summary: The BTS phenomenon, driven by global fan spending and tourism, is expected to provide sustained economic benefits to South Korea. The fanbase generates significant revenue through merchandise, concerts, and international travel. This cultural export demonstrates how entertainment can become a major economic driver for nations.
content: BTS-mania, with all the fan spending and travel, is poised to boost South Korea's economy well into the future

zh.title: BTS狂热有望长期促进韩国经济发展
zh.summary: 由全球粉丝消费和旅游驱动的BTS现象预计将为韩国带来持续的经济效益。粉丝群体通过商品、演唱会和国际旅游产生了可观的收入。这种文化出口展示了娱乐如何成为国家的主要经济驱动力。

title: Rocket Lab and these four stocks are joining the Nasdaq 100, with SpaceX waiting in the wings
summary: Rocket Lab and four AI-focused companies are being added to the Nasdaq 100 index, with SpaceX positioned as a likely future addition. The index shakeup reflects investor interest in space technology and artificial intelligence sectors. SpaceX's pending IPO makes it a prime candidate for eventual inclusion.
content: The Nasdaq 100 could imminently include SpaceX, but first it’s getting a shakeup that will usher in another space-technology company and four flashy AI plays.

zh.title: Rocket Lab和四只股票加入纳斯达克100指数，SpaceX蓄势待发
zh.summary: Rocket Lab和四家人工智能公司被添加到纳斯达克100指数，SpaceX被定位为未来的可能添加项。指数调整反映了投资者对太空技术和人工智能领域的兴趣。SpaceX即将进行的IPO使其成为最终纳入的主要候选者。

title: A Chinese start-up's unfolding dilemma exposes cracks in Beijing's tech funding machine
summary: A Chinese startup's struggles have revealed structural weaknesses in Beijing's government-backed tech funding model, which relies on direct equity stakes from officials at multiple levels. This contrasts with the U.S. approach of indirect support through incentives and tax benefits. The issue highlights challenges in how different governments manage tech sector investments.
content: While the U.S. channels support to tech winners indirectly via incentives, Chinese governments at every level take direct equity stakes.

zh.title: 一家中国初创公司的困境暴露了北京科技融资机制的裂缝
zh.summary: 一家中国初创公司的困境暴露了北京政府支持的科技融资模式的结构性弱点，该模式依赖于多个层级官员的直接股权投资。这与美国通过激励措施和税收优惠进行间接支持的做法形成对比。这个问题突出了不同政府在管理科技部门投资方面的挑战。

title: Oil prices fall on hopes of U.S.-Iran deal despite Tehran pushback
summary: Oil prices declined Friday following U.S. President Trump's announcement of a framework agreement with Iran, signaling potential easing of Middle East tensions despite Iranian resistance.
content: Oil prices fell on Friday after U.S. President Donald Trump said Washington had reached a framework agreement with Iran, raising hopes that tensions in the Middle East could ease.

zh.title: 伊朗协议希望推动油价下跌，尽管伊朗反对
zh.summary: 美国总统特朗普宣布与伊朗达成框架协议，油价周五下跌，表明中东紧张局势可能缓解，尽管伊朗提出反对。

title: Stock futures tick higher as Wall Street gears up for SpaceX’s historic IPO: Live updates
summary: Stock futures are rising ahead of SpaceX's debut on Nasdaq Friday, marking the largest IPO in history for Elon Musk's rocket company.
content: Elon Musk's rocket maker is set to debut on the Nasdaq on Friday in what will be the largest IPO in history.

zh.title: 华尔街为SpaceX历史性IPO做准备，股指期货上涨
zh.summary: SpaceX周五在纳斯达克上市，股指期货随之上升，这是埃隆·马斯克火箭公司历史上规模最大的IPO。

title: Pirro's losses in Fed investigation should stay on the books, judge rules
summary: Judge James Boasberg denied U.S. Attorney Jeanine Pirro's request to vacate earlier orders in a Federal investigation, ruling her losses must remain on record.
content: In a scathing ruling, Judge James Boasberg denied U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia Jeanine Pirro's request to vacate his earlier orders.

zh.title: 法官裁决：皮罗在联邦调查中的损失应保留在案卷中
zh.summary: 法官詹姆斯·博斯伯格驳回了美国律师珍妮·皮罗撤销联邦调查中早期命令的请求，裁定她的损失必须保留在案卷中。

title: I’m 55 and earn $100,000. Should I take a $2,900 monthly pension — or $2,200 with 3% annual hikes?
summary: A 55-year-old earning $100,000 annually seeks guidance on choosing between a $2,900 monthly pension or a $2,200 option with 3% annual increases, planning to work until age 60.
content: “I plan to continue working until age 60.”

zh.title: 我55岁，年收入10万美元。我应该选择每月2900美元的养老金——还是选择每年增加3%的2200美元方案？
zh.summary: 一位年收入10万美元的55岁员工寻求指导，在选择每月2900美元的养老金或2200美元（每年增加3%）的方案之间做出选择，计划工作到60岁。
